Description: WL-SWTP SMD White Top view PLCC, size 3014, Daylight, 3 V, 120°
This is the pads where we will solder the 7 segment displays

Multi connection point. Often used as Generic Header-pin footprint for 0.1 inch spaced/style header connections       You can populate with any combo of single row headers, but if you'd like an exact match, check these:  Header - 2x3 (Male, 0.1") (PRT-12807)   Header - 2x3 (Female, 0.1") (PRT-13010)   2x3 Pin Shrouded Header (PRT-10877)       On any of the 0.1 inch spaced packages, you can populate with these:  Break Away Headers - Straight (PRT-00116)   Break Away Male Headers - Right Angle (PRT-00553)   Female Headers (PRT-00115)   Break Away Headers - Machine Pin (PRT-00117)   Break Away Female Headers - Swiss Machine Pin (PRT-00743)       Special note: the shrouded connector mates well with our 3x2 ribbon cables:  Ribbon Crimp Connector - 6-pin (2x3, Female) (PRT-10651)   Ribbon Cable - 6 wire (15ft) (PRT-10646)
